title: SOL 15pk Scented Tea Light Candles Wild Lavenders - 3.5hr Long Burn Time, Ideal for Home, Relaxation, Romantic Dinners, Weddings, Festive Decors, Cosy Evenings, Christmas & New Year, Great for Gifting
features: Relaxing Scent - These scented tea lights soothe your senses with an exquisite fragrance that will definitely relieve stress and produce a welcoming and pleasant smell that will raise anyone's mood.

Long-Burning Scented Candles Tea Lights – Each candle tea light burns for approximately 3.5 hours, offering a delightful fragrance and a warm glow, making every pack a fantastic option for relaxation and ambiance.
Decorative Piece - Infuse your home with the delightful aroma of lavender. Our scented tealight candles not only elevate the mood but also enhance the aesthetic of any room.
Provide Beautiful Light - Our lavender tea lights are designed to emit a lovely, brilliant light that complements any classic tea light candle holder, perfect for creating a cosy ambiance.
Ideal Gift - Our tea lights scented come carefully packed and include 15 tealight candles in your chosen aroma ideal for Christmas, wedding, housewarming, birthday or any occassion.
description: Product description Transform your home into a haven of tranquility with SOL 15pk Scented Tea Lights Candles. Infused with the delicate aroma of wild lavender, these tea lights scented create a soothing and inviting ambiance, perfect for relaxation, festive gatherings, and elegant décor. Each lavender tea light candle offers a 3.5-hour burn time, ensuring a long-lasting, clean burn with minimal smoke. Whether enhancing a romantic dinner, a peaceful bath, or a cozy evening, these tea candles scented bring warmth and refinement to any setting. The soft, flickering glow of these candle tea lights elevates any space, making them ideal for both modern and classic décor. Placed on dining tables, mantelpieces, or inside tealight holders, these candles add a subtle yet sophisticated touch. Perfect for Christmas décor, these Christmas scented tea lights complement festive celebrations beautifully. Whether used as Christmas tea lights scented on a holiday table or arranged as Christmas t lights, their calming glow and fragrance enhance any seasonal setting. Versatile and timeless, these scented Christmas tea lights suit every occasion, from meditation and spa sessions to special celebrations and everyday indulgence. For a custom scent experience, pair them with vanilla scented tea lights to create a luxurious, layered fragrance. Crafted from premium wax, these Christmas tea lights candles scented ensure an even burn, diffusing a calming lavender aroma that promotes relaxation. Their elegant presentation makes them a perfect gift for housewarmings, birthdays, and weddings. Designed to fit standard tealight holders, these tea lights scented Christmas offer effortless elegance. Whether lighting a tea candle for a quiet retreat or arranging Christmas tea lights for a grand celebration, these lavender tea lights add a touch of warmth, fragrance, and festive charm to every occasion. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials, do not leave unattended, monitor burn time, and properly dispose of candle remnants.
